1.description: Select Trondheim municipality polygon (by name) and kommunenummer

2.description: Select active high-risk quick-clay hazard polygons filtered by relevant risk class column and return their geometries

3.description: Select buildings within Trondheim municipality using kommunenummer filter and return geometries and building id

4.description: Find buildings that intersect quick-clay high-risk polygons

5.description: Compute centroid of Trondheim municipality polygon

6.description: Compute distance from municipality centroid to each intersecting building

7.description: Sort buildings by ascending distance to centroid
